text: Free sample given tried and liked, so got some more

This has a very lovely smell to it. Unfortunately I haven't been able to test the sunscreen on it (been indoors since March) but have used it as a moisturizer. I'm very happy that it doesn't leave that lingering white residue from other sunscreens. Overall it's a great moisturizer and I'm impressed with it. I'm sure it makes a great sunscreen protector too.
Brilliant cleanser that is gentle enough on the skin but really helps to tackle breakouts
I just love this precleansing balm! it removes makeup and sunscreen like a champ and doesn't leave my breakout prone skin oily or cause any kind of acne.
After using this my skin feels grrreeeaaaat! Thanks Dermalogica.

I use this under my foundation for a smooth, fabulous and flawless look. Great for nighttime dress up looks as it adds a bit of light reflective shine and glamour. Use it for casual daytime wear just to give a smoother skin look of no make up at all. Really, really like this product.

Let me start by saying that this serum works really great. I started noticing awesome results after a week. I highly recommend this serum for anyone that wants to try it out. I give this a five star rating absolutely love it. Gifted by dermalogica
Shipping and packing is amazing on time and if there is any issues the customer service is great with handling your order .
Great moisturizer! It would be even better if it had sun protection as well.

Gifted by Dermalogica Love love love. A moisturizer that makes me skin silky smooth feeling and an sunscreen on top of that. Winner. I usually go for mineral sunscreens but I’m really love it one.add vitamin c and you have glowing skin. I highly recommend you check it out.
Not too heavy or too light! Perfect amount of moisture.
I love this product it keeps me from having puffy eyes!
It’s a pretty standard cleanser. Foams well, hardly any sent. I think it works about as well as any other cleanser I’ve purchased.

I like the cleanser. It goes on nice, feels great when you wash it off, and makes me feel clean afterwards. But I've been using it for a month and have really seen no huge difference. I also switch on and off with the resurfacing cleanser, to wich i would give the same review. good cleansers, no major changes.

Since receiving Melting Moisture Masque, I have massaged a pea size amount into my skin according to your directions, and cannot see any difference in the appearance of my skin. The texture reminds me of vaseline, as it just seems to lay on the surface of my skin, without seeping into it. A costly experiment, and I am greatly disappointed. Thanks for listening.
Glides on easy & feels light on skin, so far I like it. But the cap to dispense serum is different & does not dispense easily.
My skin normally breaks out around that time of the month but since starting this product I have seen numerous breakouts. I stopped using this and the breakouts went away.
Maybe because it’s only been two weeks, but have not seen any changes goid or bad

I have been using the breakout clearing booster and the fizzing blackhead mask together. I honestly love the packaging of both, it's very nice looking! As far as the actual products, I thought the breakout clearing booster was okay. I've found that using this product as a spot treatment works best for me. I put it on a troubled spot at night before bed and the next morning the spot is le

I purchased some products to take advantage of a promotional offer. Upon checkout the offer code was not accepted. I emailed customer services to advise them of the issue but no follow up was received. I assumed the promotional products would be added to my order for delivery. But no. I only received the products I paid for. Products are good don't get me wrong. But the set up of a promotion

I have received this product #giftedbydermalogica to test in exchange for my honest opinion. The size of this product was bigger than I expected. It was easy to use. It made my skin softer and I didn’t break out from using it which is very good for me. Definitely a keeper.
Cooling on my skin doesn't dry it out, I feel it soaks up all the excess oil. Reduction in breakouts and scaring
I feel like it may be soon to leave a review. However I can see a difference I also accidentally deleted my before photo :weary: but so far overall I love it.
This blends well with jo white residue and work’s amazingly. I work outside and I am very fair skinned and I haven’t got sunburned yet!!!
Great product but a bit too pricy and as such not accessible to all, but all in all great product, smooth and goes on like silk
